item.title: From pregnant at 15 and hanging out in the art classroom at lunch...

item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Ugh. Full time back in office sucks...
item.description: Back in office full time. Don't know why tiny octopus feels so drained. Like just, bleah...It'll get better, but this first week absolutely sucked. This is one of those times tiny octopus wants a hetero life mate, just so they can be like, "lay here" and be the big spoon for a minute. And yeah, it don't amount to a hill of beans in this crazy world, but someone come get tiny octopus' credit card and go get him sushi. all salmon nigiri please.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Blank Check for Musk
item.description: Bill giving Congressional Authority to Musk to eliminate any executive department, agency, independent establishment, corporation, office, or officer, found unnecessary. Comer sponsors this bill yet is unaware of the language within that allows Musk to bypass Congress

A dump of some old memes, just in case you need a couple more reasons to join a union or eat the rich.

item.title: One of our most powerful enemy.
item.description: It's a book. A very highly recommended one. I briefly knew the author (sadly, he passed ten years ago), and he was one of the smartest persons I knew. This is not spam, the book is free to be read for personal use on Google Books here: https://books.google.it/books?id=jwfhUHuugrgC (you could also buy it, of course, but this version is complete).
item.dc:creator: PaperinoVB

item.title: Cat introduces her babies to her human
item.description: Not only trust is here but this cat seems like it needs some cuddles and comfort of her own, so she brings her kitties over to the human so that she can nurse them while the human is comforting her. That's just too cute. Source: Reddit https://reddittrending.short.gy/all/r/mildlyinfuriating/trending/popular/comments/1jhysvrggh59

item.title: Another meme dump of relatable things
item.description:
Literally my cat, every night.
Actually my own picture. Saw it on the subway in Toronto. I had a small laugh, even though I'm not Muslim.
Cat tax; my Rumi being a magnificent queen.
Also Rumi sneezing. Lost my job today (Hudsons Bay) and wanted to cheer myself up. Hope yall got a smile too.
item.dc:creator: Semotion

item.title: Returning after a long time, is this site extremely heavily moderated now or something???
item.description: Like half of what I post says it is posted but never becomes visible? Do they just shadowban everything?
item.dc:creator: Rosedream72

item.title: Golden retrievers fall in love so fast
item.description: Looks like all Chucky needed was a golden retriever!
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1314 (constantintotaled)
item.description:
Another day, another opportunity to get this bread.
Oops.
Pippin remembers he is a dinosaur.
Target market acquired.
Prehistoric Puffin escaping from stampeding mammoth.
The only part about this untrue is that there are surprisingly few snake-handling churches in Arizona: namely, zero that I'm aware of.
It's always nice to see a Tenontosaurus that's NOT a prop for an attacking Deinonychus pack
GNU Terry Pratchett
Big mood.
I love how this is a DOUBLE joke in the lore: that whole Noldor Kinslaying thing where they weren't given boats, and the mistreatment of Gimli's dad by Legolas' dad in The Hobbit.
10/10, would let her fill with my malice and greed or whatever.
I am absolutely going to use this if I ever get into another really bad accident that I survive nearly unscathed from.
I think I may add this to my list of stock responses that otherwise includes only "It is what it is," and "the horrors persist, but so do I."
Mood.
The worst sermon I ever heard is that we have no right to critique the government because we're not in medieval Byzantium anymore, and our words would fall on even more deaf ears than the Emperors of old. Like, uh, wtf?
10/10 would wear this shirt. (You are now hearing the soundtrack and new villager shhh-ahhhh sound and feeling nostalgia)
Hopefully, someone feels about me this way someday. But it's okay if it never happens.
You don't have to do all of the things to resist. Do what you can.
Oh thank God. I saw GF dances at first and worried that your girlfriend was dancing here to pay off her predatory student loans.
Mood.
We need more of these in the US right now.
Alexander hopped up on White Monster is a terrifying thought to me.
See also: Aragorn, son of Arathorn, Faramir, son of Denethor, arguably Sir Samuel Vimes, Duke of Ankh and Carrot Ironfoundersson.
The newly described earliest dinosaur from North America, Ahvaytum bahndooiveche, was named by the Shoshone people whose ancestral land this dinosaur was found on.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Glory! Whatdoin? Peekaboo!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Should have save this for Pride.
item.dc:creator: coastalfoundhound

item.title: I wasn’t expecting that!!
item.description: I’ve put my hand on mama’s belly MANY times since I got her a couple of days ago but I just felt a kick!! And then another one!! I’ve got chills!!! This is not my first pregnant mama cat but it’s just as exciting as the first time!! Mama is not bothered but I am so excited!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: I don't think I've seen this version on here yet.
item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: The Cummunist
item.description: The Cummunist: Pleasure for all, not just the privileged few! This card vibrates with the energy of liberation, because no one should be left behind in the pursuit of satisfaction. Whether solo or in solidarity, the movement is strong and the rhythm is steady! Remember: true cumrades make sure everyone reaches the climax of the revolution! If anyone wants to see more of my embroidery work: https://rebordacaoembroidery.etsy.com
item.dc:creator: rebordacao

item.title: So, people keep yapping about the pointlessness of striving for utopias. Why, though? The pursuers of dystopias are doing just fine!
item.dc:creator: Az663

item.title: REPORT: Another person "disappeared" by ICE, this time with even less known about them or even the thinnest veneer of justification.
item.description:
His name is Alireza Doroudi, an Iranian national and doctoral student at the University of Alabama. He was reportedly abducted from his own home at 5 am. He had shown support for the protests AGAINST the anti-Israel Iranian dictatorship. He's pro-Israel if nothing else, not known to be pro-Hamas or even pro-Palestine. His only legal issue was a speeding ticket from a few years back and nothing else. News source 1: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/university-alabama-doctoral-student-detained-ice-governments-college-c-rcna198320 News source 2: https://abc7news.com/post/alireza-doroudi-alabama-student-detained-ice-school-says-department-homeland-security-visa-was-revoked/16091152/ Adam Mockler covers this: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GqFkq7z9pNc
So says the White House's official Twitter in reference to terrorists. Apparently, though, anyone that even sneezes in a way that's unfavorable to Israel, America or who is not of the right ethnic background is a 'radical left terrorist' to this administration.
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: Brutal Truth! :)
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: I wish I had that peace
item.dc:creator: Fulustreka

item.title: What Happened Today #57
item.description: One man. One mess. A thousand front lines. Trump’s power grabs are detonating across the system—watchdogs gutted, migrants disappeared, Social Security shoved toward collapse, law firms silenced under threat. Now the backlash is everywhere. From Boston to Berlin, hundreds of Tesla protests are hitting Musk where it hurts, his wallet and his brand, for bankrolling this coup. Read today’s post. Then bring the noise. Subscribe free online: govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.npr.org/2025/03/28/nx-s1-5315118/cfpb-shuttering-trump-doge 2. https://abcnews.go.com/International/wireStory/new-us-strikes-houthi-rebels-kill-1-yemen-120285871 3. https://www.nbcnews.com/health/health-news/texas-measles-outbreak-grows-us-cases-rcna198557 4. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn8r87z8vl0o 5. https://www.sltrib.com/news/politics/2025/03/28/pride-flag-ban-utah-first-state/ 6. https://www.wsj.com/politics/national-security/hegseth-brought-his-wife-to-sensitive-meetings-with-foreign-military-officials-c16db0ea 7. https://www.theguardian.com/business/2025/mar/28/fcc-disney-abc-dei-investigation 8. https://apnews.com/article/trump-earthquake-usaid-disaster-asia-myanmar-001e305f0233611c0702629803e6239b 9. https://www.bbc.com/news/live/cwyd5zr20gdt 10. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/28/voice-of-america-shutdown-trump-028458 11. https://www.cnn.com/2025/03/28/us/columbia-university-katrina-armstrong-steps-down/index.html 12. https://www.washingtonpost.com/immigration/2025/03/28/judge-blocks-trump-deportations-migrants-other-countries/ 13. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-supreme-court-deportations-venezuelan-gang-members-alien-enemies-act/ 14. https://www.jsonline.com/story/news/politics/elections/2025/03/28/ag-josh-kaul-vows-action-to-stop-musk-payments-to-wisconsin-voters/82708069007/ 15. https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/law-firm-targeted-trump-jenner-block-suing-block/story?id=120256937 16. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/28/trump-skadden-law-firm-executive-order.html 17. https://www.startribune.com/u-graduate-student-detained-by-ice-agents/601265118 18. https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5220511-trump-firings-nlrb-mspb-appeals-panel/ 19. https://www.wired.com/story/doge-rebuild-social-security-administration-cobol-benefits/ 20. https://actionnetwork.org/event_campaigns/teslatakedown
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
